title: polemonium viscosum subsp. elegans
intro: Polemonium viscosum subsp. elegans, also known as Rocky Mountain or Elegans Jacob's Ladder, is a plant species within the Polemonium genus, characterized by its distinctive, fern-like foliage and blue to purple, bell-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Polemonium viscosum subsp. elegans include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help soothe respiratory issues and alleviate pain. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Polemonium viscosum subsp. elegans include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
